description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with three prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body. The staves are vertically aligned and slightly indented, giving the barrel a classic coopered appearance. The top and bottom are flat and slightly recessed, suggesting a secure fit for the lid. One side of the barrel features three small circular holes and a larger bung hole, typical for filling or draining contents. The surface is matte and appears to be unfinished or lightly sanded wood, with no visible paint or labeling. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A classic wooden barrel with three reinforcement bands, vertical staves, and a flat lid, featuring a bung hole and small circular holes on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain side with three horizontal bands and vertical staves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three small holes and a central bung hole, along with the reinforcement bands.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with no visible holes or markings, just the bands and staves.
description_view_3: Side view identical to the front and rear, showing only the bands and staves.
